name: The Golf House
about: The Golf House is an indoor golf simulator venue and social hub located in Midlothian, TX. It features top-tier technology with golf bays and a multi-sport simulator, combining a high-tech environment with a cozy, family-friendly atmosphere. The venue offers flexible booking options, including bay rentals, memberships, and event hosting. It operates as a go-to spot for both practice and social gatherings, providing amenities such as lounge spaces and 24/7 member access. Members receive monthly simulator hours and discounts on additional time, with options for corporate and group packages.
why_golfers_like_it: Cutting-edge golf simulators with multi-sport capabilities
24/7 member access for flexible practice and play
Family-friendly atmosphere with lounge spaces for socializing
Monthly membership hours and discounts on additional time
Versatile space for events, parties, and corporate gatherings

food_and_drink.notes: External food and beverages are allowed, with partnerships available for local catering
External alcohol is permitted for events

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar-based launch monitor with high accuracy

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, golfers are expected to bring their own clubs for use in the simulator bays.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: External food and beverages are allowed, with options to partner with local caterers for events.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes on a simulator typically takes 1-2 hours, depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Golf House offers a family-friendly atmosphere and welcomes children, with options for parties and events suitable for all ages.
